overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a morning walk through a futuristic coastal city. The player travels along a waterfront promenade beneath elevated highways, passing from an open intersection toward a large circular stadium while sparse traffic and flying vehicles move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway ramps

events.description: a dark van drives past from right to left on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved sidewalk next to an elevated highway ramp, approaching a traffic light

notable_agents.action: van driving along the road from right to left, passing the camera

entered.detail: large circular building with metallic silver roof and multiple levels
curved concrete overpass structure with metal railings
large pink digital advertisement screen on building facade
tall futuristic towers with glass facades and neon signage
tall palm tree planted in sidewalk median
black and yellow striped concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright morning in a futuristic city, with the camera walking along a curved sidewalk. A large circular stadium dominates the left side while elevated highway ramps curve overhead. A van passes by on the right, and the distant skyline features towering skyscrapers with neon accents.

events.description: water becomes visible on the right as the path opens to the waterfront canal
flying vehicle passes overhead in the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade under the shadow of the elevated highway

entered.detail: calm waterway with murky green water reflecting the structures above
red metal framework industrial buildings standing in the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront promenade as the camera moves under the elevated highway structure. Industrial red buildings stand in the water to the right while the stadium remains visible on the left. The lighting becomes slightly diffused under the overpass, and a flying vehicle passes overhead near the end of the segment.

events.description: path curves left toward the stadium entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left and approaching the large circular stadium building, moving toward the entrance

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian walkway with yellow interior lighting connecting buildings
ground level entrance structure to the circular stadium

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left, leaving the waterfront behind and approaching the massive circular stadium. A glass pedestrian bridge with warm yellow lighting becomes visible on the left. The stadium dominates the center of the frame as the camera moves toward the entrance area beneath the highway interchange.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright futuristic city, transitioning from an open urban intersection toward the imposing architecture of a massive stadium. It begins on a curved sidewalk beneath sweeping elevated highway ramps, with a van passing by against a distant skyline of neon-accented skyscrapers. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts beneath the overpass onto a waterfront promenade where the lighting becomes diffused and industrial red buildings emerge from the water. The perspective then turns left, leaving the coast behind to approach the stadium's entrance as a glass pedestrian bridge with warm yellow lighting appears. Finally, the camera glides toward the center of the frame, where the stadium dominates the view beneath the complex highway interchange.
